The '''Drup Asteroid Field''' was located in the [[Drup's Star system/Legends|Drup's Star system]], outside the [[Orbit/Legends|orbits]] of the [[Star system/Legends|system's]] three [[Planet/Legends|planets]]. It was the location of [["Woern's Asteroid"]].
